description: Indicators to analyze for intraday (sub-daily bars) market metrics
rationale: Curated for intraday trading: removed slow/lagging indicators unsuitable for short timeframes, added session-specific and time-based indicators unique to intraday.

design_principles.noise_adaptation: Shorter timeframes have higher noise-to-signal ratio. Removed slow indicators (aroon, adxr) that generate too many false signals.
design_principles.session_awareness: Markets have session structure (e.g., SHFE day/night, CME RTH/ETH). Added session-specific indicators (VWAP, session levels, opening range).
design_principles.volume_importance: Intraday volume patterns are highly informative. Added relative volume measures.
design_principles.time_effects: Time-of-day patterns are significant. Added bar_of_day and session_phase features.
design_principles.response_speed: Prefer responsive indicators (EMA over MA/WMA, removed lagging variants).
design_principles.frequency_agnostic: Indicator periods should be calibrated based on chosen bar size.

momentum.note: Core momentum indicators. Periods calibrated based on bar size.

trend.note: Responsive trend indicators. Core MAs (ema, sma, tema) kept; dema moved to structural (redundant between ema and tema). Added plus_di/minus_di for directional strength, aroonosc for trend timing.

volatility.note: Volatility critical for intraday. Removed var (redundant with stddev).

normalization.note: HIGH IC POTENTIAL: Normalized/bounded indicators (stationary signals). %B shows position within bands (0-1), Z-scores show standard deviations from mean.

previous_session.note: HIGH IC POTENTIAL: Previous session levels are key institutional references. gap_pct measures overnight gap for fade/continuation signals.

institutional_levels.note: Pivot points (widely watched support/resistance) and CMF (Chaikin Money Flow - volume-weighted accumulation/distribution).

volume.note: Classic volume indicators. adosc (A/D oscillator) and bop (balance of power) added. Session-relative volume in session_indicators.

oscillators.note: MACD and Stochastic with periods calibrated for chosen frequency.

regression.note: Trend direction. Removed tsf (less reliable on noisy data).

context.note: Intraday uses 2-layer context: session_phase (in time_features) + volatility_state. Trend-based regime does NOT work for intraday (signal persistence too short).

session_indicators.note: UNIQUE TO INTRADAY: VWAP is critical institutional benchmark. Session levels for support/resistance. Volume percentile for relative activity. prev_session_close for gap analysis.

opening_range.note: UNIQUE TO INTRADAY: Opening range breakouts are major intraday signals. Markets with multiple sessions have separate OR levels.

time_features.note: UNIQUE TO INTRADAY: Time-of-day effects are significant. Session phase (opening/midday/closing) affects volatility and volume. Bar count indicators account for holiday schedules (no night session).

predictive_indicators.description: Indicators suitable for IC (Information Coefficient) analysis. Excludes structural/contextual variables and price-level indicators that should be used as conditional gates, not linear predictors.

structural_indicators.description: Structural/contextual indicators NOT suitable for IC analysis. Use as conditional gates in strategy logic, not as linear predictors. Includes price-level indicators (raw bands, price channels) whose IC reflects price correlation, not predictive signal.

usage_guide.bars_remaining: Exit timing (close positions before day end)
usage_guide.dema: Fast-response MA for structural gates (redundant with ema/tema for IC)
usage_guide.bbands_upper: Bollinger upper band price level (use bbands_pct_b for normalized signal)
usage_guide.bbands_middle: Bollinger middle band price level (use bbands_pct_b for normalized signal)
usage_guide.bbands_lower: Bollinger lower band price level (use bbands_pct_b for normalized signal)

rationale.aroon_*: Designed for longer timeframes, too noisy on short bars
rationale.plus_di_minus_di: Too noisy on short timeframes without additional filtering
rationale.tsf: Time series forecast less reliable on noisy intraday data
rationale.market_regime: Trend-based regime doesn't work for intraday (short signal persistence, autocorrelation near zero)

added_for_intraday.rationale: Session structure, VWAP benchmark, opening range breakouts, and time-of-day patterns are critical for intraday trading but don't exist in interday context. Bar count indicators handle holiday schedules (no night session after holidays).

period_calibration.note: Indicator periods should be scaled based on chosen bar size to maintain consistent look-back time
